mapper.insert: insert into article_like (user_id, article_id, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{articleId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: delete from article_like where user_id = #{userId} and article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.select: select id, user_id, article_id, create_time from article_like where user_id = #{userId} and article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
